data.title: Global CDNs
data.description: Google employs a globally distributed content delivery network (CDN) to ensure minimal latency and high availability.
data.technical_spec: Use of edge servers and data caching for faster content delivery.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Google's architecture is based on a microservices model, facilitating scalability and maintenance.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Google Cloud provides the backbone for scalable and reliable operations.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with Kubernetes for container orchestration.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Sophisticated load balancing algorithms ensure equitable distribution of user requests.

data.title: Redundancy and Failover
data.description: Redundancy in network and services ensures failover in case of any disruptions.
data.technical_spec: Multiple data centers and failover mechanisms.
